---
title: "SB5 Climate SDM Presentations"
---

This repository hosts reusable Quarto/Reveal.js presentations for Save the Blue Five work on climate projections, ocean downscaling, biological data readiness, and species distribution modeling.

## Talks

### Megafauna Workshop Galapagos 2026

Climate projections, biological data readiness, ocean downscaling workflows, and first-generation SDM interpretation.

[Open presentation](talks/megafauna_workshop_galapagos_2026/)

## Reproducibility

The source files live in the repository root and `talks/`. Rendered GitHub Pages files are written to `docs/`.

```bash
quarto render
```

R package versions are locked with `renv`:

```r
renv::restore()
```
